creator: czarkoff@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 176679
svn diff

The attached patch updates irc/icbirc to version 2.1.

To ease up maintenance I changed the way of removing "rcsid" string:  instead of patching it away I remove it using ${REINPLACE}.  Thus the total number of patches is reduced to 1.

Tested with icbd server and tkirc client, works.
